properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I used to be the one who would long to hear Your voice A child who sought to win his Father's heart But as I carried on, life's got a hold on me Now here I am a son so far from home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Tell me when did I loose my first love? Where did the fire and passion go? Burn in me Your holy fire give me back my lost desire And restore in me the love I felt for You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Can I remember how it felt? When they looked into my face And they saw the love of Jesus in my eyes, When I looked back on my life And questioned where I've been Can I really say I've done my best for you?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh where did I go (I've lost my way) Oh I'm lost and I'm alone Oh help me please Lord lead me home.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Father take me back Let me start again Lord I've failed and fallen in my pride Lead me back to you (back to you) Where my life began Revive in me the yearning that has died
